all_candidates.topic: Does alleged NEET exam irregularity warrant a system overhaul?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A week-long messaging app ban occurred ahead of a NEET re-examination around July 4, 2026, amid climate activist Sonam Wangchuk's protest over alleged exam irregularities.

all_candidates.topic: Should social media platforms be fully liable for illegal content?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 8, 2026, Republic TV reported the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology issued a stern notice to Meta regarding alleged CSAM on Instagram.

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven tech layoffs in India justified for productivity gains?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports from July 5-9, 2026, indicate 25,000-35,000 tech jobs could be cut in India this year due to AI-driven 'silent layoffs' and restructuring.

all_candidates.topic: Should officials face personal liability for public resource diversion?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 11, 2026, five senior Food Corporation officials were suspended over suspected collusion in the diversion of rice meant for the poor in the North-East.

all_candidates.topic: Is blocking Chinese apps justified for India's national security?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 4, 2026, the Centre blocked several Chinese battery-management applications for security reasons.

all_candidates.topic: Should consumers have choice between E20 and other petrol blends?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 10, 2026, the government ruled out offering pure petrol or lower ethanol blends as options to E20 fuel, citing feasibility issues.

all_candidates.topic: Is E20 petrol's lower mileage acceptable given its benefits?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 10, 2026, the Petroleum Ministry admitted E20 fuel may reduce mileage by 3-5% but cited other benefits and stability from global crude prices.

all_candidates.topic: Will RBI's new mis-selling rules effectively protect bank customers?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Effective July 1, 2026, RBI introduced new rules making customers eligible for refunds/compensation for mis-sold financial products.

all_candidates.topic: Should gig worker welfare laws be uniformly implemented across states?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Discussion on 'Gig workers, aggregators & the new welfare law' was highlighted in a July 4, 2026 news analysis, noting the Centre-State overlap.

all_candidates.topic: Will Maharashtra's new bike taxi permits improve commuter safety?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 7, 2026, Maharashtra announced it would issue permits for app-based bike taxi services from August 1, 2026, under a new regulatory framework.

all_candidates.topic: Is West Bengal's new anti-crime law an overreach of state power?
all_candidates.news_anchor: West Bengal's new anti-crime law, allowing preventive detention and tougher action against organised crime, comes into force July 13, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should Aadhaar email updates remain permanently free for citizens?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Effective July 1, 2026, updating email addresses in Aadhaar became free via the mobile app until December 31, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should states be allowed to audit private power distribution companies?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 3, 2026, the Supreme Court halted the Delhi government's CAG audit of three private discoms.

all_candidates.topic: Should India prioritize domestic over foreign military procurement?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 4, 2026, the Defence Acquisition Council (DAC) cleared ₹52,000-crore military purchases, aligning with indigenisation.

all_candidates.topic: Should buyers be protected from supplier GST tax defaults?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 11, 2026, the GST Council's law committee cleared a proposal to protect buyers from losing Input Tax Credit (ITC) if suppliers default on tax deposits.

all_candidates.topic: Should India prioritize linking UPI with more foreign payment systems?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 11, 2026, PM Modi announced that India and New Zealand are working to link their UPI and payment systems.

all_candidates.topic: Is the 'whole-of-government' approach effective for ease of business?
all_candidates.news_anchor: In the first week of July 2026, the government directed ministries to enforce a 'whole-of-government' approach using the PM GatiShakti platform for deregulation.

all_candidates.topic: Is overhauling tax administration necessary for smooth GST implementation?
all_candidates.news_anchor: On July 11, 2026, reports indicated government plans for a fundamental restructuring of tax administration, including the CBEC, for glitch-free GST.

all_candidates.topic: Is auto-locking GST ITC in GSTR-3B beneficial for businesses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: From the July 2026 tax period, manual ITC adjustments in GSTR-3B will end, with ITC auto-populated and locked from GSTR-2B.

all_candidates.topic: Does the new India-Israel investment agreement balance protection and regulation?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The India-Israel Bilateral Investment Agreement came into force on July 4, 2026, setting rules for investment protection.
